name: Emergency Plumber
description: Connect with 24/7 available plumbing professionals serving your area for rapid emergency response.

name: Burst Pipe Repair
description: Fast leak isolation and burst pipe repairs for underground, in-wall, and ceiling pipework.

name: Blocked Drain Unblocking
description: Professional drain clearing services to unblock sinks, toilets, and main sewer drains.

name: Blocked Toilet Repair
description: Fast assistance to unblock stubborn toilet blockages, overflow issues, and cistern repairs.

name: Drain Repairs
description: Structural drain laying and drain repairs for broken or damaged underground wastewater pipes.

name: CCTV Drain Inspection
description: High-definition camera inspections to locate root intrusions, pipe collapses, and hidden drainage defects.

name: Hydro Jetting & High-Pressure Drain Cleaning
description: High-pressure water jetting to scour grease, tree roots, and heavy debris from blocked sewer lines.

name: Sewer Line Repair
description: Repair broken sewer mains, eliminate root blockages, and restore council-compliant wastewater connections.

name: Stormwater Drain Repair
description: Prevent surface flooding with custom stormwater drainage repairs, cesspits, and soakhole maintenance.

name: Pipe Relining
description: No-dig trenchless pipe repair solution to restore damaged underground pipes without excavating lawns or driveways.

name: Hot Water Cylinder Installation and Replacement
description: Connect with local specialists for electric and gas hot water cylinder installations and replacements.

name: Hot Water Cylinder Repair
description: Repairs for leaking cylinders, thermostat failures, element replacements, and low hot water pressure.

name: No Hot Water Repair
description: Urgent troubleshooting for hot water outages, tripped breakers, valve failures, and cold showers.

name: Gasfitting and Gas Repairs
description: Connect with certificated local gasfitters for gas appliance connections, gas lines, and safety repairs.

name: Gas Leak Detection
description: Urgent gas leak tracing, line isolation, pressure testing, and emergency gas safety repairs.

name: Gas Water Heater Repair
description: Continuous flow gas hot water repairs (Calorifiers, Rinnai, Rheem) and gas line troubleshooting.

name: Leaking Tap Repair
description: Fix dripping taps, washer replacements, mixer tap repairs, and new tapware installations.

name: Leaking Pipe Repair
description: Trace and repair concealed water pipe leaks behind walls, under floors, and in ceilings.

name: Toilet Installation and Repair
description: Fix running toilets, unblock cisterns, replace flush valves, and install modern water-saving toilets.

name: Water Leak Detection
description: Acoustic and thermal leak detection to pinpoint hidden water leaks and prevent structural water damage.

name: Water Pressure Repairs
description: Troubleshoot low water pressure and upgrade low-pressure cylinders to high mains pressure systems.

name: Shower Repair and Installation
description: Leaking shower mixer repairs, shower rose replacements, and complete shower plumbing installations.

name: Bathroom Plumbing
description: Plumbing rough-ins, vanity installations, bath fitting, and fixture upgrades for bathroom renovations.

name: Kitchen Plumbing
description: Sink installations, mixer tap fitting, dishwasher connections, and kitchen renovation plumbing.

name: Commercial Plumbing
description: Scheduled maintenance, commercial drain clearing, and emergency plumbing for local businesses.

name: Underfloor & Underground Leak Detection
description: Acoustic detection and repair for concealed water leaks underneath concrete foundations and subfloors.

name: Waste Disposal Unit Installation & Repair
description: InSinkErator and waste disposer unit repairs, jam clearing, and replacement unit installations.

name: Outdoor Tap Installation & Repair
description: Install new outdoor hose taps, frost-resistant brass hose bibs, and garden water supply lines.

name: Pressure Reducing Valve & Pressure Limiting Valve Replacement
description: Replace pressure limiting valves (PLV) to safeguard household appliances from high mains pressure.

name: Roof Plumbing & Spouting Repairs
description: Spouting leak repairs, Marley PVC & Colorsteel gutter replacements, flashings, and downpipe maintenance.

name: Drainage & Sump Pump Installation and Repair
description: Basement sump pump testing, float switch repairs, and subsoil groundwater pump installations.

name: Pipe Thawing & Freeze Protection
description: Safe pipe thawing and frost insulation for frozen water lines in colder South Island & alpine regions.

name: Underfloor & Radiator Heating Maintenance
description: Hydronic in-slab underfloor heating and radiator central heating boiler repairs and flushing.

name: Septic System Installation & Repairs
description: Rural wastewater system plumbing, septic tank repairs, and effluent drainfield maintenance.

name: Farm & Rural Plumbing Repairs
description: Stock trough plumbing, rural water line repairs, trough float valves, and shed pipework.

name: Water Tank & Rainwater Harvesting Setup
description: Rainwater collection tank plumbing, UV filtration systems, and pressure pump integration.

name: Submersible & Water Tank Pump Repair
description: Bore pumps, water tank pressure pumps, and rural water supply pump repair services.

name: Industrial Plumbing Maintenance
description: Industrial process pipework, factory water lines, and commercial backflow testing.
